name: agentdr-fleet-pack
description: Fleet/osquery pack that proves AgentDR is installed and emitting events on every endpoint. Import via `fleetctl apply -f agentdr-osquery-pack.json` or paste into the Fleet UI 'Queries' library. Cross-platform: each query is platform-scoped.

agentdr_installed_macos.query: SELECT name, path, version FROM apps WHERE name LIKE 'AgentDR%';

agentdr_launchdaemon_running.description: Verify the AgentDR LaunchDaemon is loaded.

agentdr_service_windows.query: SELECT name, status, start_type, path FROM services WHERE name = 'AgentDR';
agentdr_service_windows.description: Verify the AgentDR Windows service is installed and running.

agentdr_systemd_linux.query: SELECT name, load_state, active_state, sub_state FROM systemd_units WHERE name = 'agentdr.service';
agentdr_systemd_linux.description: Verify the AgentDR systemd unit is active on Linux.

agentdr_process_running.query: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, start_time FROM processes WHERE name LIKE 'adr-agent%';

agentdr_events_jsonl_freshness_macos.query: SELECT path, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path = '/var/log/agentdr/stdout.log';
agentdr_events_jsonl_freshness_macos.description: Heartbeat: stdout log mtime should be recent.

agentdr_events_jsonl_freshness_linux.query: SELECT path, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path = '/var/lib/agentdr/logs/events.jsonl';
agentdr_events_jsonl_freshness_linux.description: Heartbeat: events.jsonl mtime should be recent.

agentdr_otlp_listener.query: SELECT pid, fd, family, local_address, local_port FROM listening_ports WHERE local_port = 4318 AND local_address IN ('127.0.0.1', '::1');
agentdr_otlp_listener.description: Verify the OTLP loopback ingest is listening on 4318.

agentdr_mcp_configs_present.query: SELECT path, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '/Users/%/.cursor/mcp.json' OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cursor/mcp.json';
agentdr_mcp_configs_present.description: Inventory of Cursor MCP configs on the endpoint (used to baseline AgentDR's mcp_server_inventory events).
